findings.evidence: Email regex pattern unchanged: apostrophe character (') not added to local-part character class [A-Za-z0-9._%+\-]. PR claims to accept apostrophes for names like o'brien but the regex still rejects them.

Regression test for apostrophe support uses vacuous assertion 'assert result in (True, False)' which passes regardless of whether apostrophes are actually accepted. Test should assert 'assert validate_email("o'brien@example.com")' to verify acceptance.
Docstring for truncate() improved with clarification about ellipsis handling and limit behavior. This is the only substantive implementation change in the PR.
